message:
test(node): add E2E tests for migrate rewrite and validate CLI subcommands

Cover three paths: rewrite --apply with rollback artifact emission
(verifying rollback JSON schema, entry count, and rewritten engines
constraint), validate failure on risky postinstall scripts with
curl-pipe-bash patterns (checking mig-validate-002/003 codes and
non-zero exit), and validate pass on a hardened project with engine
constraints and lockfile. Tests run the compiled binary against
temporary project directories.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
